---
title: "Lily Peck"
image: images/Sweetie2.jpg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin 
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/yourlinkedinname/
      target: _blank
    - icon: github 
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/test
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:test@ucsb.edu
    - icon: bluesky
      text: bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/lilypeck.bsky.social
      target: _blank
---

I'm currently a postdoctoral scholar at the University of California Los Angeles, Ecology and Evolutionary Biology Dept. working with Dr. Victoria Sork. My research focusses upon the ecology and evolution of natural populations of plants and fungi. Specifically, I am currently working on genetic and epigenetic responses of tree populations to climate change. I received my PhD from Imperial College London in the Barraclough lab. Click through the tabs for more information about the projects and publications which I am involved with.
